summary: This is an Informed Consent Form (ICF version 1.0, dated 15 August 2022) for study BIORCE-NEU-2022-004 sponsored by Biorce Therapeutics. The form explains a randomized, placebo-controlled trial testing BRC-209 (Velagostat) in early Alzheimer's disease patients, with treatment duration up to 96 weeks, and includes signature blocks for participant, study partner, and investigator consent.
content:
BIORCE 
THERAPEUTICS


PARTICIPANT INFORMATION SHEET AND INFORMED CONSENT FORM


Study: BIORCE-NEU-2022-004  |  ICF Version 1.0 · 15 August 2022
EudraCT: 2022-003891-28


What is this study about?




Why is this research being done?


We are testing BRC-209 (Velagostat) to see whether it can slow memory and thinking problems caused by early Alzheimer's disease. It works by trying to stop a harmful protein called tau from building up in brain cells.






Do I have to take part?


No. Participation is entirely your choice. If you decide not to join, or change your mind later, your regular medical care will not be affected in any way.




What will happen?




Which treatment will I receive?


You will be randomly allocated to receive either BRC-209 (the study medicine) or a placebo (a dummy tablet). You have a 2-in-3 chance of receiving BRC-209. Neither you, your carer, nor your doctors will know which you are taking. One tablet every morning for up to 96 weeks.




Possible Risks


BRC-209 is experimental. There may be unknown side effects. You will be carefully monitored.


Side effect
How common?
Usually mild?


Headache
~1 in 3
Yes


Nausea
~1 in 4
Yes


Dizziness
~1 in 5
Usually — report if falls


Fatigue
~1 in 6
Yes


Brain imaging finding (ARIA)
Not observed yet
Being monitored closely


Contact


For...
Contact


Study questions
Your study doctor


Your rights
Local Ethics Committee


Urgent safety (24/7)
+34 900 234 567


Your Consent


I have read and understood this form (ICF v1.0, 15 August 2022).


I have had enough time and been able to ask questions.


I understand I can withdraw at any time without reason.


I agree to take part.



  Participant signature: _____________________ Date: ___/___/______

  Study partner signature: __________________ Date: ___/___/______

  Investigator signature: ___________________ Date: ___/___/______





BIORCE-NEU-2022-004 · ICF v1.0 · 15 August 2022


CONFIDENTIAL © 2022 Biorce Therapeutics S.L.
